queries.question: Which independent directors work for Global Corp and which executive managers work for the same company?
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Employees
WHERE (Employees.Board_Member = "Independent Director" OR Employees.Board_Member = "Executive Manager") AND Employees.Organization = "Global Corp"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?employees p:Board_Member ?board_member_w .
  ?employees p:Board_Member ?board_member_w2 .
  ?employees p:Organization ?organization_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?board_member_w) = "Independent Director" || STR(?board_member_w2) = "Executive Manager")) && STR(?organization_w) = "Global Corp"))
}

queries.question: Show independent directors and executive managers who work for Global Corp.
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Employees
WHERE Employees.Board_Member = "Independent Director" OR Employees.Board_Member = "Executive Manager" AND Employees.Organization = "Global Corp"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?employees p:Board_Member ?board_member_w .
  ?employees p:Board_Member ?board_member_w2 .
  ?employees p:Organization ?organization_w .
  FILTER((STR(?board_member_w) = "Independent Director" || (STR(?board_member_w2) = "Executive Manager" && STR(?organization_w) = "Global Corp")))
}
